title: AXIOM CI processing pass
action: Run AXIOM Process against the image with every artifact category enabled, DPAPI decryption armed, and the case keyword list loaded. Pay particular attention to MRU folder access, MRU opened/saved files, Recycle Bin, Shellbags, all five SRUM tables, execution evidence (Prefetch, Amcache, BAM/DAM), and anti-forensics indicators.
rationale: CI investigations turn on proof of intentional user action. Running every category at once means the timeline pass below has the corroborating artefacts on hand without a second processing run.
expected_result: AXIOM Examine opens with a populated Artifacts tree, an Anti-forensics category, and the keyword search hits surfaced.

axiom.action: In AXIOM Process: Evidence Sources → add the image. Processing Details → enable every artifact category (Communication, Device Activity, Operating System, etc.). Tick DPAPI decryption and supply the user password. Import the case keyword list via Keyword Search → Import. Confirm Hash Sets includes NSRL + Project VIC if applicable. Click Analyze Evidence.
axiom.ui_path: AXIOM Process > Evidence Sources / Processing Details / Keyword Search
axiom.notes: DPAPI decryption needs the user password (live or recovered); without it stored credentials and Edge/Chrome saved logins won't decrypt. Magnet.AI skin-tone classification is a separate Processing Details toggle.
